prompt_md: A team's LLM feature is over budget and feels slow. They want changes that reduce **cost**, **latency**, or both **without** unacceptably hurting quality. **Select every option that is a legitimate cost or latency optimization lever.**

choices: Cap the maximum output length and instruct the model to be concise
Cache a stable prompt prefix so it isn't re-processed each call
Route simple, high-volume requests to a smaller, cheaper model
Trim irrelevant history and retrieved text from the input context
Always use the largest available model for every request
Add extra unrelated retrieval steps to every request just in case
